description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisites: YoRHa Clan, B Designation, Level 8+ (You cannot have the 'No2' feat.)

The true designation of those with the 'B' designation, designed to specialize in the brutal and lethal combat necessary to eliminate those deemed necessary targets, either by your latent programming or your creator. You gain a new designation in addition to your previous one: E (Executioner). You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase an ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 20.

  • Your mind cannot be read, and lies you tell cannot be discerned by creatures of equal or lower level than you. Creatures higher level than you have disadvantage on checks made to discern your intentions.

  • At the end of each rest, you can select one creature type, clan, or affiliation. Your YoRHa weapons and Hijutsu have their attack rolls, damage rolls, and skill check bonuses increased by +2 while in combat against the chosen option. You become unable to reason with or deal non-lethal damage against those creatures, and when they reach 0 hit points, they are instantly killed.

  • You can manifest another YoRHa weapon identical to your own for the next minute by spending a bonus action and 5 chakra. This second weapon gains 1 seal of your choice that was placed on your original weapon. For the duration, you gain the benefits of the Two-Weapon stance in addition to any other stance you are currently gaining the benefits of, and when you take the Attack action while wielding it, you make an additional attack with this second weapon, once per turn.

  • Bloodied creatures halve any bonuses they would receive to attacks or saving throws made against you.
